body.value:
@concat(
  'grant_type=client_credentials',
  '&client_id=', activity('KV - Get ADF SharePoint ClientID').output.value,'@', activity('KV - Get ADF SharePoint TenantID').output.value,
  '&client_secret=', activity('KV - Get ADF SharePoint Secret').output.value,
  '&resource=00000003-0000-0ff1-ce00-000000000000/cleancoqueensland.sharepoint.com@',
     activity('KV - Get ADF SharePoint TenantID').output.value
)

activities.name: Execute Pipeline - AVEVA_PI_Health_Check
activities.description:
This pipeline is called to check the health of the AVEVA PI Web API. 
If it fails, an error notification will be raised and the no further  activities for the AVEVA_PI_Ingest pipeline will commence.

activities.name: Get Folder Metadata from Unify View
activities.description: Get folder metadata from Unify view CTL.VW_AVEVA_PI_TAG_NAME_DATES per TagCategory.

dependsOn.activity: Get Folder Metadata from Unify View

activities.name: Execute Pipeline - Archive
activities.description: Pipeline will copy files from landing to timestamped archived folder (.zip) then delete files in landing.

activities.name: Check Error Log Table
activities.description: Check if any error records require a notification to be sent.

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
CASE WHEN COUNT(Record_ID) > 0 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END AS ErrorsDetected
FROM [CTL].[AVEVA_PI_ERROR_LOG]
WHERE NotificationSent = 0

activities.name: Script - Update Error Log Table NotificationSent

dependsOn.activity: Get Tag Metadata from Unify View

value.value:
@concat(

  formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(),'UTC','E. Australia Standard Time'),'MM'),'/',
  formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(),'UTC','E. Australia Standard Time'),'dd'),'/',
  formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(),'UTC','E. Australia Standard Time'),'HH'),'/',
  formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(),'UTC','E. Australia Standard Time'),'mm'),'/',
  formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(),'UTC','E. Australia Standard Time'),'ss'),'/'
)
